name: Consumers Cooperative
description_short: Consumers Cooperative Federal Credit Union is a member-owned, not-for-profit financial institution offering checking, savings, loans, and digital banking services with competitive rates.
description_long: Consumers Cooperative Federal Credit Union is a federally chartered credit union operating as a member-owned, not-for-profit financial cooperative. Like all credit unions, it is regulated by the National Credit Union Administration (NCUA) and prioritizes member value over shareholder profit. The institution has maintained an online presence at ccfcuonline.com and offers a range of consumer financial products and services. The credit union provides comprehensive consumer lending and deposit products, including checking and savings accounts, auto loans (APR as low as 5.25%), personal loans (APR as low as 9.00%), home equity real estate loans (APR as low as 6.00%), boat loans (APR as low as 6.25%), and lines of credit (APR as low as 9.00%). Members can access mortgage services and apply for loans online. The institution supports digital banking through a mobile app, online banking portal, and telephone banking available 24/7 at 866-653-0473. Consumers Cooperative distinguishes itself through electronic signature (eSignature) technology that allows members to close loans anytime and anywhere without in-person visits, expediting the lending process. The credit union also offers Remote Deposit Capture via mobile app, enabling members to deposit checks by photographing both sides ($3,000 per check limit, $3,000 daily limit). Additional convenience features include 24-hour telephone banking, lost/stolen card reporting at 800-500-1044, and membership in the credit union system which typically provides lower rates and better terms than traditional banks. As a credit union, Consumers Cooperative operates on a cooperative model designed to benefit members rather than external shareholders. The advertised rates appear competitive for the credit union sector.
services: Home equity real estate loans (APR as low as 6.00%)
Lines of credit (APR as low as 9.00%)
ATM and Visa Debit Card services
pros: Auto loans starting at 5.25% APR, competitive compared to traditional banks
24/7 telephone banking at 866-653-0473 for account access and transactions
Electronic signature (eSignature) service allows loan closing anytime, anywhere without in-person visits
Remote Deposit Capture via mobile app enables check deposits by photo
Member-owned, not-for-profit structure typically offers better rates than for-profit banks
Multiple loan products: auto, personal, home equity, boat loans, lines of credit, and mortgages
Mobile app with deposit, banking, and account management features
cons: Website does not clearly state membership eligibility requirements or how to join
No information provided about monthly account fees, minimum balances, or overdraft charges
Limited details about physical branch locations and hours despite 'Locations & Hours' link
Remote deposit daily limit of $3,000 is restrictive for some users
Website lacks information on savings account rates, CD rates, or other deposit product APYs
best_for: Members seeking competitive auto loan rates (5.25% APR) and multi-product banking
Consumers who prefer 24/7 account access via phone or digital channels
Borrowers who need to close loans electronically without visiting a branch
Members who regularly deposit checks and want mobile remote deposit capability
diagnosis: Consumers Cooperative Federal Credit Union is best for members seeking a comprehensive credit union with competitive loan rates, 24/7 digital banking access, and the convenience of electronic loan closing. The main caveat is that membership eligibility, fee structures, and specific product details (like savings rates) are not transparent on the website, requiring direct contact to evaluate full suitability.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_description: Consumers Cooperative — NCUA-insured credit union in Alliance, NE. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
